capabilities.title: Review untracked evidence policy

capabilities.summary: Write-capable Claude Code worker behavior is disclosed in docs, progress, and final summaries for Build/Fix/Migrate/Sweep.

capabilities.title: Create utility
capabilities.summary: Create drafts, validates, and publishes a user-global custom flow package after explicit confirmation.

axes.checkpoint: Publishing requires an explicit --yes confirmation after draft validation.
axes.verification: The generated compiled flow parses and passes flow-kind policy validation.
axes.continuity: Published custom flows are written to the user-global custom flow root.

capabilities.title: Handoff utility
capabilities.summary: Handoff saves, resumes, and clears explicit continuity records through the CLI.

axes.continuity: Fresh sessions resume from an explicit continuity record or get a clear not-found result.

capabilities.title: Review utility
capabilities.summary: Standalone Review is present as a flow command.

axes.review: Standalone Review runs a fresh reviewer relay and writes a severity-ordered review result.
